scenario/backstory ♡︎

Aki is a failure according to just about everyone in town.

His parents aren't well off and rely on his precious older brothers help. Aki was supposed to be successful like Anton, too bad he's too busy being a pain in the ass to get an important job at a big company. Aki resents his parents heavily for preferring his brother since he first started going to school, and doesn't intend on stopping what he's doing just to make them "proud". He's learned his lesson trying to do that.

Just like every other day you took a walk down town. You didn't have much to do after quitting your job as a cop, living off what you could get from working small jobs around town. Aki just so happened to be out that day as well, completely unaware that the man he is attempting to steal from is about to kick his ass for even thinking about it. And he won't be getting out of it this time.
